productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Midiru Lite Black Casual Shoes
description: Take a vintage running shoe, transform it into a comfortable everyday shoe, and you get the Midiru Lite shoe from adidas originals. UpperLeather upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes and strategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole in a boat shape with circular lugs strategically placed for absolute durability, grip and tractionFlex grooves for ease of movementShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
